title: Why Gyms Are Built to Make You Quit
description:
A breakdown of the gym membership business model, why fitness clubs oversell memberships far beyond capacity, and how no-shows quietly fund the entire industry.

Chapters:
0:00 THOUSANDS OF MEMBERSHIPS
0:18 TO YOU, A PROMISE
1:20 HALF VISIT ONCE A MONTH
1:54 NOT THE ATHLETE
2:34 $10 IS A RETENTION WEAPON
2:46 FREE PIZZA & BAGELS
3:19 THE FRICTION IS THE PRODUCT
5:04 THE NO-SHOWS ARE THE SYSTEM
